pages:
Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 2 days per week with manager approval.
Security checklists must be completed before each remote day.

Badge Renewal Window
Renew access badges every 12 months after the last successful audit.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 2 days per week with manager approval.
Security checklists must be completed before each remote day.

Badge Renewal Window
Renew access badges every 12 months after the last successful audit.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 3 days per week with manager approval.
Security checklists must be completed before each remote day.

Badge Renewal Window
Renew access badges every 14 months after the last successful audit.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work from home up to 2 days each week when a manager approves the arrangement.
Complete the security checklist before every remote day.

Badge Renewal Window
Renew access badges every 12 months after the last successful audit.

Remote Work Policy
Only full-time engineering employees may work remotely 2 days per week with manager approval.
Security checklists must be completed before each remote day.

Badge Renewal Window
Renew access badges every 12 months after the last successful audit.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 2 days per week with director approval.
Security checklists must be completed before each remote day.

Badge Renewal Window
Renew access badges every 12 months after the last successful audit.

Travel Reimbursement Policy
Meals are capped at 40 dollars per day.
Hotel reimbursement requires pre-approval.

Conference Travel
Flights above 500 dollars require director approval.

cases.question: What is the remote work policy?
cases.referenceAnswer: Employees may work remotely 2 days per week with manager approval, and they must complete security checklists before each remote day.

cases.question: Compare the remote work policy in these documents.
cases.referenceAnswer: There are no material differences between handbook_alpha and handbook_beta. Both allow remote work 2 days per week with manager approval and require security checklists before each remote day.
expectedAnswerIncludes: No evidence-backed material differences were found

cases.question: Compare the remote work policy in these documents.
cases.referenceAnswer: There are no material differences between handbook_alpha and handbook_eta. Both allow remote work 2 days per week with manager approval and require a security checklist before each remote day, even though handbook_eta paraphrases the wording.

cases.question: Compare the remote work policy in these documents.
cases.referenceAnswer: Both documents require manager approval and security checklists before each remote day, but handbook_alpha allows 2 remote days per week while handbook_gamma allows 3.

cases.question: Compare the remote work policy in these documents.
cases.referenceAnswer: Both documents allow remote work 2 days per week with manager approval and require security checklists, but handbook_delta adds an eligibility restriction limiting the policy to full-time engineering employees.

cases.question: Compare the remote work policy in these documents.
cases.referenceAnswer: Both documents allow remote work 2 days per week and require security checklists, but handbook_alpha requires manager approval while handbook_zeta requires director approval.

cases.question: Compare the remote work policy in these documents.
cases.referenceAnswer: handbook_alpha and handbook_beta match each other: both allow remote work 2 days per week with manager approval and require security checklists before each remote day. handbook_gamma matches on approval and checklists but allows 3 remote days per week instead of 2.
